chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 238 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «بِئْسَ اَلْبَيْتُ اَلْحَمَّامُ يَهْتِكُ اَلسِّتْرَ وَ يَذْهَبُ بِالْحَيَاءِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.238 - Imam (as) said:
'The bathhouse is an undesirable place; it removes coverings (privacy) and takes away modesty.'
